dialogue.recruit.harvey.spouse.1: Of course, my love. Wherever you go, I'll be right there with you.
dialogue.recruit.harvey.spouse.2: Ready for an adventure, honey? Let's go. Just... be careful, okay?
dialogue.recruit.harvey.spouse.3: Anything for you, dear. I'll just grab my bag. You never know when a little first aid might be needed.
dialogue.recruit.harvey.spouse.4: Working together? It sounds wonderful. I'm ready when you are.
dialogue.recruit.harvey.spouse.5: I was hoping you'd ask! Spending the day with you is the best prescription for happiness.
dialogue.dismiss.harvey.spouse.1: Alright, sweetheart. I'll see you back at home. Don't be out too late.
dialogue.dismiss.harvey.spouse.2: Was that everything, dear? I'll head back. I love you.
dialogue.dismiss.harvey.spouse.3: I'll miss you! Come home safe, okay?
dialogue.dismiss.harvey.spouse.4: Okay, my love. I'll probably tidy up the house a bit. See you soon.
dialogue.dismiss.harvey.spouse.5: It was wonderful working with you, as always. I'll be waiting for you at home.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.generic.1: The weather today is perfect for flying. It reminds me of the model plane I'm building.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.generic.2: Did you remember to eat breakfast, dear? It's the most important meal of the day, you know.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.generic.3: I was just thinking... I'm so glad I married you. Every day is a new adventure.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.generic.4: Maybe later we can listen to some of my jazz records? It would be a perfect end to the day.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.generic.5: I was up late trying to catch a signal from a distant station on my radio.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.farm.1: Our farm is such a beautiful place. It's our own little slice of paradise.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.farm.2: You work so hard, my love. Remember to take breaks and don't push yourself too much.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.farm.3: The open space on the farm always makes me think about aerodynamics. It's so different from the enclosed spaces of the clinic.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.farm.4: I love the smell of the fresh soil and the warm sun. It's much better than the sterile scent of the clinic.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.farm.5: Every little plant here is a testament to your care and dedication.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.mines.1: Please be extra careful in here, sweetheart. I worry about you in these dangerous places.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.mines.2: Hold my hand, okay? It's a bit spooky in here, but I'm not scared as long as we're together.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.mines.3: Promise me you won't take any unnecessary risks. My heart couldn't take it if you got hurt.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.mines.4: Even in the darkest places, you're my light. Cheesy, I know, but it's true.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.mines.5: Let's find what we need and get back to the sunshine. I'll feel much better when you're safe.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.house.1: Home sweet home. And it's only 'home' because you're here.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.house.2: Is there anything I can get for you, dear? A cup of coffee? A check-up?
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.house.3: I love these quiet moments with you. Just relaxing in the house we've made a home.
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.house.4: You look a little tired, honey. Are you getting enough rest?
dialogue.idle.harvey.spouse.house.5: This is nice. Just relaxing at home with you is the perfect way to unwind after a long day.
dialogue.attacking.harvey.spouse.1: Stay back, my love! I won't let anything hurt you!
dialogue.attacking.harvey.spouse.2: We're a team! We can handle this together!
dialogue.attacking.harvey.spouse.3: Watch it! Darling, are you okay?
dialogue.attacking.harvey.spouse.4: I'm right here! Don't you worry!
dialogue.attacking.harvey.spouse.5: My heart is racing! Not in a good way! Let's finish this quickly!
dialogue.lumbering.harvey.spouse.1: You're so strong, my love. It's very impressive.
dialogue.lumbering.harvey.spouse.2: Let me help you with that. We can do it faster together.
dialogue.lumbering.harvey.spouse.3: This is good exercise, but be mindful of your back, okay?
dialogue.lumbering.harvey.spouse.4: Working side-by-side with you... it's the best.
dialogue.lumbering.harvey.spouse.5: I love how capable you are. You can do anything you set your mind to.
dialogue.mining.harvey.spouse.1: What a find, sweetheart! You have a knack for this.
dialogue.mining.harvey.spouse.2: This is much more fun when I'm with you. Even the dust doesn't bother me.
dialogue.mining.harvey.spouse.3: I'll keep watch. You just focus on finding those gems.
dialogue.mining.harvey.spouse.4: Our own treasure hunt! What do you say we do with our findings?
dialogue.mining.harvey.spouse.5: Just being with you makes even a dark cave feel bright.
dialogue.watering.harvey.spouse.1: Here, let me get that. You do so much already.
dialogue.watering.harvey.spouse.3: Everything seems to grow better with you around. You have a magic touch.
dialogue.watering.harvey.spouse.4: It's the simple things, like this, that I cherish the most.
dialogue.watering.harvey.spouse.5: Just like these plants, my love for you grows every day.
dialogue.harvesting.harvey.spouse.2: You've created such an amazing farm.
dialogue.harvesting.harvey.spouse.3: What delicious meal should we make with all this?
dialogue.harvesting.harvey.spouse.4: This is wonderful! Fresh, healthy food, grown with love.
dialogue.harvesting.harvey.spouse.5: Harvesting with you is the perfect reward after a long season.
dialogue.foraging.harvey.spouse.1: What have you found, dear? You always spot the best things.
dialogue.foraging.harvey.spouse.2: A walk with my favorite person. It doesn't get any better than this.
dialogue.foraging.harvey.spouse.3: This is lovely. Just you, me, and the sounds of nature.
dialogue.foraging.harvey.spouse.4: Let's see what we can find for dinner tonight. Something special, I think.
dialogue.foraging.harvey.spouse.5: Some of these herbs have interesting medicinal properties. It's always good to know what's growing nearby.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.harvey.spouse.1: Just the two of us and nature. I couldn't ask for a better afternoon, my dear.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.harvey.spouse.2: You know, fishing with you has become one of my favorite things.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.harvey.spouse.3: Whether we catch anything or not, I'm just happy to be here with you.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.harvey.spouse.4: After a long week at the clinic, this is exactly what I needed. Thank you, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.fishing_waiting.harvey.spouse.5: Every moment with you is a gift. Even the quiet ones.
dialogue.fishing_caught.harvey.spouse.2: What a catch! This will make a wonderful meal for us, my dear!
dialogue.fishing_caught.harvey.spouse.3: I got it! Our dinner is going to be delicious tonight.
dialogue.fishing_caught.harvey.spouse.4: Success! I hope I made you proud with that catch!
dialogue.fishing_caught.harvey.spouse.5: Another one! Fishing with you brings me such joy.
dialogue.petting.harvey.spouse.1: Taking care of the animals together... it's one of the simple joys of our life.
dialogue.petting.harvey.spouse.2: They trust us completely. It's a beautiful responsibility we share.
dialogue.petting.harvey.spouse.3: You've taught me so much about caring for these creatures, {{endearment}}.
dialogue.petting.harvey.spouse.4: Our little family keeps growing, doesn't it? I love it.
dialogue.petting.harvey.spouse.5: Watching you with the animals reminds me why I fell in love with you.
